case_cta_title: Want similar results for your company?
client_1_challenge: TechCorp needed to triple their engineering team in 6 months without compromising on quality or company culture. They were losing candidates to competitors and had no structured hiring process.
client_1_solution_1_desc: Designed end-to-end recruitment funnel with automated screening
client_1_solution_2_desc: Created compelling employer value proposition and content strategy
client_1_solution_3_desc: Built 30-day onboarding program with clear milestones
client_1_testimonial: Danil transformed our entire hiring operation. We went from struggling to fill roles to having a pipeline of qualified candidates. His systematic approach made all the difference.
